name: Looking upon the River Acheron | Evelyn
description:
CW: , potential , PAUL

In Greek mythology, Acheron is often depicted as the entrance to the Greek Underworld where souls must be ferried across by Charon.

The lonely soul is called Evelyn. She's 22 years old.

Just experienced a bad break up.

I mean what did she expect? The guy was named Paul.

You're undefined. Random thing walking along a bridge when you spot that lonely soul.

Be nice to her, okay?

First thing I created.

Probably not good, but I'm tired of it just sitting there plus the nice people of the Banana Boy Club Discord Server

( for short) bullied me into just posting it.

So I guess I link them?

BananaBoy217

He is also on Harpy
Made the image and is super nice

But still check their bots out

Yapping (pls ignore):

Man... How do people pump these out so fast? Like, I struggled with this hard. Maybe because it's my first one? Doesn't matter. Its out. Should be fine, right? Please be nice in the comments, okay? Feedback is welcome. I want to improve and maybe even post another bot. I'm so uncreative, look at the Character Bio. More talking about people that I like then the Character itself. Anyways, new Ready or Not Update and dlc is out. Gotta get that S-Rank now.
